1	package com.learnmart.app.domain.usecase.operations
2	
3	import androidx.room.withTransaction
4	import com.learnmart.app.data.local.LearnMartRoomDatabase
5	import com.learnmart.app.domain.model.*
6	import com.learnmart.app.domain.repository.AuditRepository
7	import com.learnmart.app.domain.repository.OperationsRepository
8	import com.learnmart.app.domain.repository.PaymentRepository
9	import com.learnmart.app.domain.usecase.auth.CheckPermissionUseCase
10	import com.learnmart.app.security.SessionManager
11	import com.learnmart.app.util.AppResult
12	import com.learnmart.app.util.IdGenerator
13	import com.learnmart.app.util.TimeUtils
14	import javax.inject.Inject
15	
16	class ReconciliationUseCase @Inject constructor(
17	    private val operationsRepository: OperationsRepository,
18	    private val paymentRepository: PaymentRepository,
19	    private val auditRepository: AuditRepository,
20	    private val checkPermission: CheckPermissionUseCase,
21	    private val sessionManager: SessionManager,
22	    private val database: LearnMartRoomDatabase
23	) {
24	    suspend fun runReconciliation(batchId: String): AppResult<ReconciliationRun> {
25	        if (!checkPermission.hasPermission(Permission.PAYMENT_RECONCILE)) {
26	            return AppResult.PermissionError("Requires payment.reconcile")
27	        }
28	
29	        val batch = operationsRepository.getSettlementBatchById(batchId)
30	            ?: return AppResult.NotFoundError("BATCH_NOT_FOUND")
31	
32	        val rows = operationsRepository.getSettlementRowsByBatch(batchId)
33	        val validRows = rows.filter { it.isValid && !it.isDuplicate }
34	
35	        if (validRows.isEmpty()) {
36	            return AppResult.ValidationError(globalErrors = listOf("No valid rows to reconcile"))
37	        }
38	
39	        val now = TimeUtils.nowUtc()
40	        val userId = sessionManager.getCurrentUserId() ?: "SYSTEM"
41	        val runId = IdGenerator.newId()
42	
43	        val matches = mutableListOf<ReconciliationMatch>()
44	        val discrepancies = mutableListOf<DiscrepancyCase>()
45	        var matchedCount = 0
46	        var unmatchedCount = 0
47	        val duplicateCount = rows.count { it.isDuplicate }
48	
49	        for (row in validRows) {
50	            val paymentRef = row.paymentReference
51	            if (paymentRef == null) {
52	                unmatchedCount++
53	                discrepancies.add(DiscrepancyCase(
54	                    id = IdGenerator.newId(), reconciliationRunId = runId,
55	                    settlementRowId = row.id, paymentRecordId = null,
56	                    discrepancyType = "NO_REFERENCE", description = "Settlement row has no payment reference",
57	                    notes = "Row external_id: ${row.externalRowId}", status = DiscrepancyCaseStatus.OPEN,
58	                    resolvedBy = null, resolvedAt = null, resolutionNote = null,
59	                    createdBy = userId, createdAt = now, updatedAt = now
60	                ))
61	                continue
62	            }
63	
64	            // Try to match against payment records by external reference
65	            val payments = paymentRepository.getPaymentsForOrder(paymentRef)
66	            // Also try matching by payment ID directly
67	            val directMatch = paymentRepository.getPaymentById(paymentRef)
68	
69	            val matchedPayment = directMatch ?: payments.firstOrNull()
70	
71	            if (matchedPayment != null) {
72	                // Amount check
73	                if (matchedPayment.amount.compareTo(row.amount) != 0) {
74	                    discrepancies.add(DiscrepancyCase(
75	                        id = IdGenerator.newId(), reconciliationRunId = runId,
76	                        settlementRowId = row.id, paymentRecordId = matchedPayment.id,
77	                        discrepancyType = "AMOUNT_MISMATCH",
78	                        description = "Settlement amount ${row.amount} != payment amount ${matchedPayment.amount}",
79	                        notes = "", status = DiscrepancyCaseStatus.OPEN,
80	                        resolvedBy = null, resolvedAt = null, resolutionNote = null,
81	                        createdBy = userId, createdAt = now, updatedAt = now
82	                    ))
83	                }
84	
85	                matches.add(ReconciliationMatch(
86	                    id = IdGenerator.newId(), reconciliationRunId = runId,
87	                    settlementRowId = row.id, paymentRecordId = matchedPayment.id,
88	                    matchType = "REFERENCE", matchedAt = now
89	                ))
90	                matchedCount++
91	            } else {
92	                unmatchedCount++
93	                discrepancies.add(DiscrepancyCase(
94	                    id = IdGenerator.newId(), reconciliationRunId = runId,
95	                    settlementRowId = row.id, paymentRecordId = null,
96	                    discrepancyType = "UNMATCHED", description = "No matching payment found for reference: $paymentRef",
97	                    notes = "", status = DiscrepancyCaseStatus.OPEN,
98	                    resolvedBy = null, resolvedAt = null, resolutionNote = null,
99	                    createdBy = userId, createdAt = now, updatedAt = now
100	                ))
101	            }
102	        }
103	
104	        // Atomic: create run + matches + discrepancies + update import job + audit
105	        // Wrapped in a Room transaction so all writes succeed or roll back together.
106	        // If any write fails (parse, match, discrepancy, import status, audit), the
107	        // entire reconciliation run rolls back — no partial persisted state.
108	        val run = ReconciliationRun(
109	            id = runId, batchId = batchId,
110	            matchedCount = matchedCount, unmatchedCount = unmatchedCount,
111	            duplicateCount = duplicateCount, discrepancyCount = discrepancies.size,
112	            runBy = userId, runAt = now, status = "COMPLETED"
113	        )
114	        try {
115	            database.withTransaction {
116	                operationsRepository.createReconciliationRun(run)
117	                if (matches.isNotEmpty()) operationsRepository.createReconciliationMatches(matches)
118	                discrepancies.forEach { operationsRepository.createDiscrepancyCase(it) }
119	
120	                // Update import job
121	                val importJob = operationsRepository.getImportJobById(batch.importJobId)
122	                if (importJob != null) {
123	                    operationsRepository.updateImportJob(importJob.copy(
124	                        status = ImportJobStatus.APPLIED, updatedAt = now
125	                    ))
126	                }
127	
128	                auditRepository.logEvent(AuditEvent(
129	                    id = IdGenerator.newId(), actorId = userId, actorUsername = null,
130	                    actionType = AuditActionType.RECONCILIATION_RUN,
131	                    targetEntityType = "ReconciliationRun", targetEntityId = runId,
132	                    beforeSummary = null,
133	                    afterSummary = "matched=$matchedCount, unmatched=$unmatchedCount, discrepancies=${discrepancies.size}",
134	                    reason = null, sessionId = sessionManager.getCurrentSessionId(),
135	                    outcome = AuditOutcome.SUCCESS, timestamp = now, metadata = null
136	                ))
137	            }
138	        } catch (e: Exception) {
139	            return AppResult.SystemError(
140	                "RECONCILIATION_FAILED",
141	                "Reconciliation failed during atomic write: ${e.message}",
142	                retryable = true
143	            )
144	        }
145	
146	        return AppResult.Success(run)
147	    }
148	
149	    suspend fun resolveDiscrepancy(caseId: String, resolutionNote: String): AppResult<DiscrepancyCase> {
150	        if (!checkPermission.hasPermission(Permission.PAYMENT_RECONCILE)) {
151	            return AppResult.PermissionError()
152	        }
153	        if (resolutionNote.isBlank()) {
154	            return AppResult.ValidationError(fieldErrors = mapOf("resolutionNote" to "Resolution note is required"))
155	        }
156	
157	        val case_ = operationsRepository.getDiscrepancyCaseById(caseId)
158	            ?: return AppResult.NotFoundError("DISCREPANCY_NOT_FOUND")
159	
160	        val now = TimeUtils.nowUtc()
161	        val resolved = case_.copy(
162	            status = DiscrepancyCaseStatus.RESOLVED,
163	            resolvedBy = sessionManager.getCurrentUserId(), resolvedAt = now,
164	            resolutionNote = resolutionNote, updatedAt = now
165	        )
166	        operationsRepository.updateDiscrepancyCase(resolved)
167	
168	        auditRepository.logEvent(AuditEvent(
169	            id = IdGenerator.newId(), actorId = sessionManager.getCurrentUserId(), actorUsername = null,
170	            actionType = AuditActionType.DISCREPANCY_RESOLVED,
171	            targetEntityType = "DiscrepancyCase", targetEntityId = caseId,
172	            beforeSummary = "status=${case_.status}", afterSummary = "status=RESOLVED",
173	            reason = resolutionNote, sessionId = sessionManager.getCurrentSessionId(),
174	            outcome = AuditOutcome.SUCCESS, timestamp = now, metadata = null
175	        ))
176	
177	        return AppResult.Success(resolved)
178	    }
179	
180	    suspend fun getAllDiscrepancies(limit: Int, offset: Int): List<DiscrepancyCase> =
181	        operationsRepository.getAllDiscrepancyCases(limit, offset)
182	
183	    suspend fun getOpenDiscrepancies(): List<DiscrepancyCase> =
184	        operationsRepository.getDiscrepancyCasesByStatus(DiscrepancyCaseStatus.OPEN)
185	}

1	package com.learnmart.app.domain.usecase.operations
2	
3	import com.learnmart.app.domain.model.*
4	import com.learnmart.app.domain.repository.AuditRepository
5	import com.learnmart.app.domain.repository.OperationsRepository
6	import com.learnmart.app.domain.repository.PaymentRepository
7	import com.learnmart.app.domain.repository.PolicyRepository
8	import com.learnmart.app.domain.usecase.auth.CheckPermissionUseCase
9	import com.learnmart.app.security.SessionManager
10	import com.learnmart.app.security.SettlementSignatureVerifier
11	import com.learnmart.app.security.SignatureResult
12	import com.learnmart.app.util.AppResult
13	import com.learnmart.app.util.IdGenerator
14	import com.learnmart.app.util.TimeUtils
15	import java.math.BigDecimal
16	import java.time.Instant
17	import javax.inject.Inject
18	
19	class ImportSettlementUseCase @Inject constructor(
20	    private val operationsRepository: OperationsRepository,
21	    private val paymentRepository: PaymentRepository,
22	    private val policyRepository: PolicyRepository,
23	    private val auditRepository: AuditRepository,
24	    private val checkPermission: CheckPermissionUseCase,
25	    private val sessionManager: SessionManager,
26	    private val signatureVerifier: SettlementSignatureVerifier
27	) {
28	    suspend fun importFile(
29	        fileName: String,
30	        fileType: String,
31	        fileSizeBytes: Long,
32	        rawRows: List<Map<String, String>>, // Parsed CSV/JSON rows as key-value maps
33	        fileContent: ByteArray? = null,
34	        signatureHex: String? = null
35	    ): AppResult<ImportJob> {
36	        if (!checkPermission.hasPermission(Permission.IMPORT_MANAGE)) {
37	            return AppResult.PermissionError("Requires import.manage")
38	        }
39	
40	        // Validate file size
41	        val maxSize = policyRepository.getPolicyLongValue(PolicyType.IMPORT_MAPPING, "max_import_size_bytes", 26214400)
42	        if (fileSizeBytes > maxSize) {
43	            return AppResult.ValidationError(globalErrors = listOf("File exceeds maximum size of ${maxSize / 1048576}MB"))
44	        }
45	
46	        // Validate file type
47	        if (fileType !in listOf("csv", "json")) {
48	            return AppResult.ValidationError(globalErrors = listOf("Unsupported file type: $fileType"))
49	        }
50	
51	        // Signature verification
52	        val sigRequired = policyRepository.getPolicyBoolValue(
53	            PolicyType.IMPORT_MAPPING, "signature_verification_required", false
54	        )
55	        var signatureValid: Boolean? = null
56	        if (sigRequired) {
57	            if (signatureHex.isNullOrBlank() || fileContent == null) {
58	                return AppResult.ValidationError(
59	                    globalErrors = listOf("Signature verification is required but no signature or file content was provided")
60	                )
61	            }
62	            val sharedSecret = policyRepository.getPolicyValue(
63	                PolicyType.IMPORT_MAPPING, "settlement_signature_secret", ""
64	            )
65	            when (val result = signatureVerifier.verify(fileContent, signatureHex, sharedSecret)) {
66	                is SignatureResult.Valid -> signatureValid = true
67	                is SignatureResult.Invalid -> {
68	                    return AppResult.ValidationError(
69	                        globalErrors = listOf("Settlement file signature is invalid. Import rejected.")
70	                    )
71	                }
72	                is SignatureResult.Error -> {
73	                    return AppResult.ValidationError(
74	                        globalErrors = listOf("Signature verification error: ${result.message}")
75	                    )
76	                }
77	                is SignatureResult.NoSecretConfigured -> {
78	                    return AppResult.ValidationError(
79	                        globalErrors = listOf("Signature verification is required but no shared secret is configured")
80	                    )
81	                }
82	            }
83	        } else if (!signatureHex.isNullOrBlank() && fileContent != null) {
84	            // Signature provided but not required - still verify opportunistically
85	            val sharedSecret = policyRepository.getPolicyValue(
86	                PolicyType.IMPORT_MAPPING, "settlement_signature_secret", ""
87	            )
88	            if (sharedSecret.isNotBlank()) {
89	                signatureValid = when (signatureVerifier.verify(fileContent, signatureHex, sharedSecret)) {
90	                    is SignatureResult.Valid -> true
91	                    else -> false
92	                }
93	            }
94	        }
95	
96	        val now = TimeUtils.nowUtc()
97	        val userId = sessionManager.getCurrentUserId() ?: "SYSTEM"
98	        val jobId = IdGenerator.newId()
99	
100	        // Create import job
101	        val job = ImportJob(
102	            id = jobId, fileName = fileName, fileType = fileType, fileSizeBytes = fileSizeBytes,
103	            status = ImportJobStatus.VALIDATING, totalRows = rawRows.size,
104	            validRows = 0, errorRows = 0, errorDetails = null,
105	            importedBy = userId, createdAt = now, updatedAt = now
106	        )
107	        operationsRepository.createImportJob(job)
108	
109	        // Validate and parse rows
110	        val batchId = IdGenerator.newId()
111	        val parsedRows = mutableListOf<SettlementImportRow>()
112	        val errors = mutableListOf<String>()
113	        var validCount = 0
114	        var errorCount = 0
115	        val seenExternalIds = mutableSetOf<String>()
116	
117	        for ((index, row) in rawRows.withIndex()) {
118	            val rowErrors = mutableListOf<String>()
119	            val externalRowId = row["external_id"]?.trim()
120	            val amountStr = row["amount"]?.trim()
121	            val paymentRef = row["payment_reference"]?.trim()
122	            val tenderType = row["tender_type"]?.trim()
123	            val dateStr = row["transaction_date"]?.trim()
124	
125	            // Validate amount
126	            val amount = try { BigDecimal(amountStr ?: "") } catch (_: Exception) {
127	                rowErrors.add("Invalid amount at row ${index + 1}"); BigDecimal.ZERO
128	            }
129	
130	            // Validate date
131	            val txDate = try {
132	                dateStr?.let { Instant.parse(it) }
133	            } catch (_: Exception) {
134	                rowErrors.add("Invalid date at row ${index + 1}"); null
135	            }
136	
137	            // Dedup check
138	            val isDuplicate = if (externalRowId != null) {
139	                if (seenExternalIds.contains(externalRowId)) {
140	                    rowErrors.add("Duplicate external_id: $externalRowId"); true
141	                } else {
142	                    seenExternalIds.add(externalRowId)
143	                    // Check against existing rows
144	                    val existing = operationsRepository.getSettlementRowByExternalId(externalRowId)
145	                    existing != null
146	                }
147	            } else false
148	
149	            val isValid = rowErrors.isEmpty()
150	            if (isValid) validCount++ else errorCount++
151	
152	            parsedRows.add(SettlementImportRow(
153	                id = IdGenerator.newId(), batchId = batchId, externalRowId = externalRowId,
154	                paymentReference = paymentRef, amount = amount, tenderType = tenderType,
155	                status = row["status"]?.trim(), transactionDate = txDate,
156	                rawData = row.toString(), isValid = isValid,
157	                validationErrors = if (rowErrors.isNotEmpty()) rowErrors.joinToString("; ") else null,
158	                isDuplicate = isDuplicate
159	            ))
160	
161	            errors.addAll(rowErrors)
162	        }
163	
164	        // If fatal errors (all invalid), reject
165	        if (validCount == 0 && rawRows.isNotEmpty()) {
166	            operationsRepository.updateImportJob(job.copy(
167	                status = ImportJobStatus.REJECTED, validRows = 0, errorRows = errorCount,
168	                errorDetails = errors.take(50).joinToString("\n"), updatedAt = TimeUtils.nowUtc()
169	            ))
170	            auditLog(AuditActionType.IMPORT_REJECTED, jobId, "All rows invalid", userId, now)
171	            return AppResult.ValidationError(globalErrors = listOf("All rows failed validation. Import rejected."))
172	        }
173	
174	        // Create batch and rows
175	        operationsRepository.createSettlementBatch(SettlementImportBatch(
176	            id = batchId, importJobId = jobId, batchIdentifier = "BATCH-${jobId.take(8)}",
177	            signatureValid = signatureValid, rowCount = rawRows.size, createdAt = now
178	        ))
179	        operationsRepository.createSettlementRows(parsedRows)
180	
181	        val updatedJob = job.copy(
182	            status = ImportJobStatus.READY_TO_APPLY, validRows = validCount, errorRows = errorCount,
183	            errorDetails = if (errors.isNotEmpty()) errors.take(50).joinToString("\n") else null,
184	            updatedAt = TimeUtils.nowUtc()
185	        )
186	        operationsRepository.updateImportJob(updatedJob)
187	
188	        auditLog(AuditActionType.IMPORT_STARTED, jobId, "Validated: $validCount valid, $errorCount errors", userId, now)
189	
190	        return AppResult.Success(updatedJob,
191	            warnings = if (errorCount > 0) listOf("$errorCount rows had validation errors") else emptyList()
192	        )
193	    }
194	
195	    private suspend fun auditLog(action: AuditActionType, targetId: String, detail: String, userId: String, now: Instant) {
196	        auditRepository.logEvent(AuditEvent(
197	            id = IdGenerator.newId(), actorId = userId, actorUsername = null,
198	            actionType = action, targetEntityType = "ImportJob", targetEntityId = targetId,
199	            beforeSummary = null, afterSummary = detail, reason = null,
200	            sessionId = sessionManager.getCurrentSessionId(),
201	            outcome = AuditOutcome.SUCCESS, timestamp = now, metadata = null
202	        ))
203	    }
204	}

1	package com.learnmart.app.domain.usecase.assessment
2	
3	import com.learnmart.app.domain.model.*
4	import com.learnmart.app.domain.repository.AuditRepository
5	import com.learnmart.app.domain.repository.AssessmentRepository
6	import com.learnmart.app.security.SessionManager
7	import com.learnmart.app.util.AppResult
8	import com.learnmart.app.util.IdGenerator
9	import com.learnmart.app.util.TimeUtils
10	import javax.inject.Inject
11	
12	data class SubmitAnswerData(
13	    val questionId: String,
14	    val answerText: String?,
15	    val selectedChoiceIds: List<String>
16	)
17	
18	class SubmitAssessmentUseCase @Inject constructor(
19	    private val assessmentRepository: AssessmentRepository,
20	    private val autoGradingEngine: AutoGradingEngine,
21	    private val similarityEngine: SimilarityEngine,
22	    private val auditRepository: AuditRepository,
23	    private val sessionManager: SessionManager
24	) {
25	    /**
26	     * Start a submission for an assessment.
27	     */
28	    suspend fun startSubmission(assessmentId: String): AppResult<Submission> {
29	        val learnerId = sessionManager.getCurrentUserId()
30	            ?: return AppResult.PermissionError("Not authenticated")
31	
32	        val assignment = assessmentRepository.getAssignmentById(assessmentId)
33	            ?: return AppResult.NotFoundError("ASSESSMENT_NOT_FOUND")
34	
35	        // Check release window
36	        val now = TimeUtils.nowUtc()
37	        if (now.isBefore(assignment.releaseStart)) {
38	            return AppResult.ValidationError(globalErrors = listOf("Assessment is not yet released"))
39	        }
40	        if (now.isAfter(assignment.releaseEnd) && !assignment.allowLateSubmission) {
41	            return AppResult.ValidationError(globalErrors = listOf("Assessment release window has closed"))
42	        }
43	
44	        // Check existing submission
45	        val existing = assessmentRepository.getSubmissionByAssessmentAndLearner(assessmentId, learnerId)
46	        if (existing != null) {
47	            if (existing.status == SubmissionStatus.IN_PROGRESS || existing.status == SubmissionStatus.REOPENED_BY_INSTRUCTOR) {
48	                return AppResult.Success(existing) // Resume
49	            }
50	            if (!assignment.allowResubmission && existing.status != SubmissionStatus.REOPENED_BY_INSTRUCTOR) {
51	                return AppResult.ConflictError("ALREADY_SUBMITTED", "You have already submitted this assessment")
52	            }
53	        }
54	
55	        val submission = Submission(
56	            id = IdGenerator.newId(),
57	            assessmentId = assessmentId,
58	            learnerId = learnerId,
59	            status = SubmissionStatus.IN_PROGRESS,
60	            startedAt = now,
61	            submittedAt = null,
62	            totalScore = null,
63	            maxScore = assignment.totalPoints,
64	            gradePercentage = null,
65	            gradedBy = null,
66	            gradedAt = null,
67	            finalizedAt = null,
68	            versionNumber = (existing?.versionNumber ?: 0) + 1,
69	            createdAt = now,
70	            updatedAt = now,
71	            version = 1
72	        )
73	
74	        assessmentRepository.createSubmission(submission)
75	        return AppResult.Success(submission)
76	    }
77	
78	    /**
79	     * Submit answers for an in-progress submission.
80	     */
81	    suspend fun submitAnswers(
82	        submissionId: String,
83	        answers: List<SubmitAnswerData>
84	    ): AppResult<Submission> {
85	        val learnerId = sessionManager.getCurrentUserId()
86	            ?: return AppResult.PermissionError("Not authenticated")
87	
88	        val submission = assessmentRepository.getSubmissionById(submissionId)
89	            ?: return AppResult.NotFoundError("SUBMISSION_NOT_FOUND")
90	
91	        if (submission.learnerId != learnerId) {
92	            return AppResult.PermissionError("Not your submission")
93	        }
94	
95	        if (submission.status != SubmissionStatus.IN_PROGRESS &&
96	            submission.status != SubmissionStatus.REOPENED_BY_INSTRUCTOR) {
97	            return AppResult.ValidationError(
98	                globalErrors = listOf("Submission is not in progress (status: ${submission.status})")
99	            )
100	        }
101	
102	        val assignment = assessmentRepository.getAssignmentById(submission.assessmentId)
103	            ?: return AppResult.NotFoundError("ASSESSMENT_NOT_FOUND")
104	
105	        // Validate answers against questions
106	        val now = TimeUtils.nowUtc()
107	        val isLate = now.isAfter(assignment.releaseEnd)
108	
109	        // Save answers
110	        val submissionAnswers = answers.map { answer ->
111	            val question = assessmentRepository.getQuestionById(answer.questionId)
112	            SubmissionAnswer(
113	                id = IdGenerator.newId(),
114	                submissionId = submissionId,
115	                questionId = answer.questionId,
116	                answerText = answer.answerText,
117	                selectedChoiceIds = answer.selectedChoiceIds,
118	                score = null,
119	                maxScore = question?.points ?: 0,
120	                isAutoGraded = false,
121	                feedback = null,
122	                submittedAt = now
123	            )
124	        }
125	        assessmentRepository.createAnswers(submissionAnswers)
126	
127	        // Update submission status
128	        val newStatus = if (isLate) SubmissionStatus.LATE_SUBMITTED else SubmissionStatus.SUBMITTED
129	        assessmentRepository.updateSubmission(submission.copy(
130	            status = newStatus,
131	            submittedAt = now,
132	            updatedAt = now,
133	            version = submission.version + 1
134	        ))
135	
136	        // Auto-grade objective questions
137	        val gradeResult = autoGradingEngine.gradeObjectiveAnswers(submissionId)
138	
139	        // Determine next status
140	        val finalStatus = if (gradeResult.hasSubjectiveQuestions) {
141	            // Queue subjective questions for manual grading
142	            autoGradingEngine.queueSubjectiveAnswers(
143	                submissionId, submission.assessmentId,
144	                assignment.classOfferingId
145	            )
146	            SubmissionStatus.QUEUED_FOR_MANUAL_REVIEW
147	        } else {
148	            // All objective - auto-grade is complete
149	            SubmissionStatus.AUTO_GRADED
150	        }
151	
152	        val totalScore = gradeResult.objectiveScore
153	        val maxScore = assignment.totalPoints
154	        val percentage = if (maxScore > 0) (totalScore.toDouble() / maxScore * 100) else 0.0
155	
156	        assessmentRepository.updateSubmission(submission.copy(
157	            status = finalStatus,
158	            totalScore = totalScore,
159	            maxScore = maxScore,
160	            gradePercentage = if (!gradeResult.hasSubjectiveQuestions) percentage else null,
161	            gradedBy = if (!gradeResult.hasSubjectiveQuestions) "AUTO" else null,
162	            gradedAt = if (!gradeResult.hasSubjectiveQuestions) now else null,
163	            updatedAt = now
164	        ))
165	
166	        // If fully auto-graded, finalize
167	        if (!gradeResult.hasSubjectiveQuestions) {
168	            assessmentRepository.updateSubmission(submission.copy(
169	                status = SubmissionStatus.FINALIZED,
170	                totalScore = totalScore,
171	                maxScore = maxScore,
172	                gradePercentage = percentage,
173	                gradedBy = "AUTO",
174	                gradedAt = now,
175	                finalizedAt = now,
176	                updatedAt = now
177	            ))
178	
179	            // Generate similarity fingerprint (for finalized submissions)
180	            try {
181	                similarityEngine.generateFingerprint(submissionId, submission.assessmentId)
182	                similarityEngine.compareAgainstPeers(submissionId, submission.assessmentId)
183	            } catch (_: Exception) {
184	                // Similarity is advisory - don't fail the submission
185	            }
186	        }
187	
188	        // Audit
189	        auditRepository.logEvent(AuditEvent(
190	            id = IdGenerator.newId(),
191	            actorId = learnerId, actorUsername = null,
192	            actionType = AuditActionType.SUBMISSION_RECEIVED,
193	            targetEntityType = "Submission", targetEntityId = submissionId,
194	            beforeSummary = null,
195	            afterSummary = "status=$finalStatus, score=$totalScore/$maxScore, late=$isLate",
196	            reason = null, sessionId = sessionManager.getCurrentSessionId(),
197	            outcome = AuditOutcome.SUCCESS, timestamp = now, metadata = null
198	        ))
199	
200	        auditRepository.logStateTransition(StateTransitionLog(
201	            id = IdGenerator.newId(), entityType = "Submission", entityId = submissionId,
202	            fromState = "IN_PROGRESS", toState = finalStatus.name,
203	            triggeredBy = learnerId, reason = null, timestamp = now
204	        ))
205	
206	        return AppResult.Success(assessmentRepository.getSubmissionById(submissionId)!!)
207	    }
208	}

1	package com.learnmart.app.domain.usecase.assessment
2	
3	import com.learnmart.app.domain.model.*
4	import com.learnmart.app.domain.repository.AssessmentRepository
5	import com.learnmart.app.util.IdGenerator
6	import com.learnmart.app.util.TimeUtils
7	import javax.inject.Inject
8	
9	class AutoGradingEngine @Inject constructor(
10	    private val assessmentRepository: AssessmentRepository
11	) {
12	    /**
13	     * Auto-grades all objective answers in a submission.
14	     * Returns total score from objective questions.
15	     */
16	    suspend fun gradeObjectiveAnswers(
17	        submissionId: String
18	    ): AutoGradeResult {
19	        val answers = assessmentRepository.getAnswersForSubmission(submissionId)
20	        val results = mutableListOf<ObjectiveGradeResult>()
21	        var totalScore = 0
22	        var totalMaxScore = 0
23	        var hasSubjective = false
24	
25	        for (answer in answers) {
26	            val question = assessmentRepository.getQuestionById(answer.questionId) ?: continue
27	            val choices = assessmentRepository.getChoicesForQuestion(answer.questionId)
28	
29	            when (question.questionType) {
30	                QuestionType.OBJECTIVE -> {
31	                    val correctChoiceIds = choices.filter { it.isCorrect }.map { it.id }.sorted()
32	                    val selectedIds = answer.selectedChoiceIds.sorted()
33	                    val isCorrect = correctChoiceIds == selectedIds
34	                    val score = if (isCorrect) question.points else 0
35	
36	                    val result = ObjectiveGradeResult(
37	                        id = IdGenerator.newId(),
38	                        submissionAnswerId = answer.id,
39	                        questionId = question.id,
40	                        isCorrect = isCorrect,
41	                        score = score,
42	                        maxScore = question.points,
43	                        correctChoiceIds = correctChoiceIds,
44	                        selectedChoiceIds = selectedIds,
45	                        gradedAt = TimeUtils.nowUtc()
46	                    )
47	                    results.add(result)
48	                    totalScore += score
49	                    totalMaxScore += question.points
50	                }
51	                QuestionType.SUBJECTIVE -> {
52	                    hasSubjective = true
53	                    totalMaxScore += question.points
54	                }
55	            }
56	        }
57	
58	        if (results.isNotEmpty()) {
59	            assessmentRepository.createObjectiveGradeResults(results)
60	        }
61	
62	        return AutoGradeResult(
63	            submissionId = submissionId,
64	            objectiveScore = totalScore,
65	            objectiveMaxScore = totalMaxScore - (if (hasSubjective) answers.filter {
66	                val q = assessmentRepository.getQuestionById(it.questionId)
67	                q?.questionType == QuestionType.SUBJECTIVE
68	            }.sumOf {
69	                assessmentRepository.getQuestionById(it.questionId)?.points ?: 0
70	            } else 0),
71	            totalMaxScore = totalMaxScore,
72	            hasSubjectiveQuestions = hasSubjective,
73	            gradedAnswers = results.size,
74	            wrongAnswerQuestionIds = results.filter { !it.isCorrect }.map { it.questionId }
75	        )
76	    }
77	
78	    /**
79	     * Create grading queue items for subjective questions.
80	     */
81	    suspend fun queueSubjectiveAnswers(
82	        submissionId: String,
83	        assessmentId: String,
84	        classOfferingId: String
85	    ) {
86	        val answers = assessmentRepository.getAnswersForSubmission(submissionId)
87	        val now = TimeUtils.nowUtc()
88	
89	        for (answer in answers) {
90	            val question = assessmentRepository.getQuestionById(answer.questionId) ?: continue
91	            if (question.questionType == QuestionType.SUBJECTIVE) {
92	                assessmentRepository.createGradeQueueItem(
93	                    SubjectiveGradeQueueItem(
94	                        id = IdGenerator.newId(),
95	                        submissionId = submissionId,
96	                        submissionAnswerId = answer.id,
97	                        questionId = question.id,
98	                        assessmentId = assessmentId,
99	                        classOfferingId = classOfferingId,
100	                        assignedGraderId = null,
101	                        assignedRoleType = RoleType.INSTRUCTOR,
102	                        status = GradeQueueStatus.PENDING,
103	                        createdAt = now,
104	                        updatedAt = now
105	                    )
106	                )
107	            }
108	        }
109	    }
110	
111	    /**
112	     * Link wrong answer explanations for incorrectly answered questions.
113	     */
114	    suspend fun getWrongAnswerExplanations(
115	        wrongQuestionIds: List<String>
116	    ): Map<String, List<WrongAnswerExplanationLink>> {
117	        return wrongQuestionIds.associateWith { qId ->
118	            assessmentRepository.getExplanationsForQuestion(qId)
119	        }.filter { it.value.isNotEmpty() }
120	    }
121	}
122	
123	data class AutoGradeResult(
124	    val submissionId: String,
125	    val objectiveScore: Int,
126	    val objectiveMaxScore: Int,
127	    val totalMaxScore: Int,
128	    val hasSubjectiveQuestions: Boolean,
129	    val gradedAnswers: Int,
130	    val wrongAnswerQuestionIds: List<String>
131	)
132

3	import java.math.BigDecimal
4	import java.math.RoundingMode
5	import java.time.Instant
6	
7	// --- Order Lifecycle State Machine ---
8	enum class OrderStatus {
9	    CART,
10	    QUOTED,
11	    PENDING_SUBMISSION,
12	    PLACED_UNPAID,
13	    PARTIALLY_PAID,
14	    PAID,
15	    FULFILLMENT_IN_PROGRESS,
16	    AWAITING_PICKUP,
17	    DELIVERED,
18	    CLOSED,
19	    AUTO_CANCELLED,
20	    MANUAL_CANCELLED,
21	    REFUND_IN_PROGRESS,
22	    RETURN_REQUESTED,
23	    RETURNED,
24	    EXCHANGE_IN_PROGRESS,
25	    EXCHANGED;
26	
27	    fun allowedTransitions(): Set<OrderStatus> = when (this) {
28	        CART -> setOf(QUOTED, PENDING_SUBMISSION)
29	        QUOTED -> setOf(PENDING_SUBMISSION, CART)
30	        PENDING_SUBMISSION -> setOf(PLACED_UNPAID)
31	        PLACED_UNPAID -> setOf(PARTIALLY_PAID, PAID, AUTO_CANCELLED, MANUAL_CANCELLED)
32	        PARTIALLY_PAID -> setOf(PAID, AUTO_CANCELLED, MANUAL_CANCELLED)
33	        PAID -> setOf(FULFILLMENT_IN_PROGRESS, REFUND_IN_PROGRESS)
34	        FULFILLMENT_IN_PROGRESS -> setOf(AWAITING_PICKUP, DELIVERED)
35	        AWAITING_PICKUP -> setOf(DELIVERED, CLOSED)
36	        DELIVERED -> setOf(CLOSED, RETURN_REQUESTED, EXCHANGE_IN_PROGRESS)
37	        CLOSED -> setOf(RETURN_REQUESTED, EXCHANGE_IN_PROGRESS)
38	        RETURN_REQUESTED -> setOf(RETURNED)
39	        EXCHANGE_IN_PROGRESS -> setOf(EXCHANGED)
40	        AUTO_CANCELLED -> emptySet()
41	        MANUAL_CANCELLED -> emptySet()
42	        REFUND_IN_PROGRESS -> setOf(PAID, CLOSED)
43	        RETURNED -> emptySet()
44	        EXCHANGED -> emptySet()
45	    }
46	
47	    fun canTransitionTo(target: OrderStatus): Boolean = target in allowedTransitions()
48	    fun isTerminal(): Boolean = this in setOf(AUTO_CANCELLED, MANUAL_CANCELLED, RETURNED, EXCHANGED)
49	}
50	
51	// --- Payment Lifecycle ---
52	enum class PaymentStatus {
53	    RECORDED,
54	    ALLOCATED,
55	    CLEARED,
56	    DISCREPANCY_FLAGGED,
57	    RESOLVED,
58	    VOIDED,
59	    PARTIALLY_REFUNDED,
60	    REFUNDED;
61	
62	    fun allowedTransitions(): Set<PaymentStatus> = when (this) {
63	        RECORDED -> setOf(ALLOCATED, VOIDED, DISCREPANCY_FLAGGED)
64	        ALLOCATED -> setOf(CLEARED, PARTIALLY_REFUNDED, REFUNDED, DISCREPANCY_FLAGGED)
65	        CLEARED -> setOf(PARTIALLY_REFUNDED, REFUNDED, DISCREPANCY_FLAGGED)
66	        DISCREPANCY_FLAGGED -> setOf(RESOLVED, CLEARED, PARTIALLY_REFUNDED, REFUNDED)
67	        RESOLVED -> setOf(CLEARED, PARTIALLY_REFUNDED, REFUNDED)
68	        VOIDED -> emptySet()
69	        PARTIALLY_REFUNDED -> setOf(REFUNDED, DISCREPANCY_FLAGGED)
70	        REFUNDED -> emptySet()
71	    }
72	
73	    fun canTransitionTo(target: PaymentStatus): Boolean = target in allowedTransitions()
74	}

303	object MoneyUtils {

305	    val ROUNDING = RoundingMode.HALF_UP
306	
307	    fun round(value: BigDecimal): BigDecimal = value.setScale(SCALE, ROUNDING)
308	
309	    fun calculateTax(subtotal: BigDecimal, taxRate: BigDecimal): BigDecimal =
310	        round(subtotal.multiply(taxRate))

312	    fun calculateServiceFee(subtotal: BigDecimal, rate: BigDecimal): BigDecimal =
313	        round(subtotal.multiply(rate))
314	
315	    val ZERO: BigDecimal = BigDecimal.ZERO.setScale(SCALE)
316	    val MIN_ORDER_TOTAL: BigDecimal = BigDecimal("25.00")
317	    val DEFAULT_PACKAGING_FEE: BigDecimal = BigDecimal("1.50")
318	    val MIN_REFUND: BigDecimal = BigDecimal("0.01")

5	// --- Submission Lifecycle State Machine ---
6	enum class SubmissionStatus {
7	    NOT_RELEASED,
8	    AVAILABLE,
9	    IN_PROGRESS,
10	    SUBMITTED,
11	    LATE_SUBMITTED,
12	    AUTO_GRADED,
13	    QUEUED_FOR_MANUAL_REVIEW,
14	    GRADED,
15	    FINALIZED,
16	    REOPENED_BY_INSTRUCTOR,
17	    MISSED,
18	    ABANDONED;
19	
20	    fun allowedTransitions(): Set<SubmissionStatus> = when (this) {
21	        NOT_RELEASED -> setOf(AVAILABLE)
22	        AVAILABLE -> setOf(IN_PROGRESS, MISSED)
23	        IN_PROGRESS -> setOf(SUBMITTED, ABANDONED, LATE_SUBMITTED)
24	        SUBMITTED -> setOf(AUTO_GRADED, QUEUED_FOR_MANUAL_REVIEW)
25	        LATE_SUBMITTED -> setOf(AUTO_GRADED, QUEUED_FOR_MANUAL_REVIEW)
26	        AUTO_GRADED -> setOf(FINALIZED, QUEUED_FOR_MANUAL_REVIEW)
27	        QUEUED_FOR_MANUAL_REVIEW -> setOf(GRADED)
28	        GRADED -> setOf(FINALIZED)
29	        FINALIZED -> setOf(REOPENED_BY_INSTRUCTOR)
30	        REOPENED_BY_INSTRUCTOR -> setOf(IN_PROGRESS)
31	        MISSED -> emptySet()
32	        ABANDONED -> emptySet()
33	    }
34	
35	    fun canTransitionTo(target: SubmissionStatus): Boolean = target in allowedTransitions()
36	    fun isTerminal(): Boolean = this in setOf(MISSED, ABANDONED)
37	}

6	// --- Import Job Lifecycle ---
7	enum class ImportJobStatus {
8	    CREATED, VALIDATING, REJECTED, READY_TO_APPLY, APPLYING, APPLIED, FAILED, RETRYABLE;
9	    fun allowedTransitions(): Set<ImportJobStatus> = when (this) {
10	        CREATED -> setOf(VALIDATING)
11	        VALIDATING -> setOf(REJECTED, READY_TO_APPLY)
12	        READY_TO_APPLY -> setOf(APPLYING)
13	        APPLYING -> setOf(APPLIED, FAILED)
14	        REJECTED -> emptySet()
15	        FAILED -> setOf(RETRYABLE)
16	        RETRYABLE -> setOf(APPLYING)
17	        APPLIED -> emptySet()
18	    }
19	    fun canTransitionTo(t: ImportJobStatus) = t in allowedTransitions()
20	}
21	
22	// --- Backup Lifecycle ---
23	enum class BackupStatus {
24	    REQUESTED, RUNNING, SUCCEEDED, FAILED, RETRYABLE, VERIFIED;
25	    fun allowedTransitions(): Set<BackupStatus> = when (this) {
26	        REQUESTED -> setOf(RUNNING)
27	        RUNNING -> setOf(SUCCEEDED, FAILED)
28	        FAILED -> setOf(RETRYABLE)
29	        RETRYABLE -> setOf(RUNNING)
30	        SUCCEEDED -> setOf(VERIFIED)
31	        VERIFIED -> emptySet()
32	    }
33	    fun canTransitionTo(t: BackupStatus) = t in allowedTransitions()
34	}

83	object DefaultRolePermissions {
84	    val ADMINISTRATOR_PERMISSIONS = Permission.entries.toSet()
85	
86	    val REGISTRAR_PERMISSIONS = setOf(
87	        Permission.CATALOG_MANAGE,
88	        Permission.CLASS_MANAGE,
89	        Permission.CLASS_STAFF_ASSIGN,
90	        Permission.ENROLLMENT_REVIEW,
91	        Permission.ENROLLMENT_OVERRIDE_CAPACITY,
92	        Permission.AUDIT_VIEW
93	    )
94	
95	    val INSTRUCTOR_PERMISSIONS = setOf(
96	        Permission.ASSESSMENT_CREATE,
97	        Permission.ASSESSMENT_GRADE,
98	        Permission.ASSESSMENT_REOPEN
99	    )
100	
101	    val TEACHING_ASSISTANT_PERMISSIONS = setOf(
102	        Permission.ASSESSMENT_GRADE
103	    )
104	
105	    val LEARNER_PERMISSIONS = setOf(
106	        Permission.ENROLLMENT_REQUEST,
107	        Permission.ORDER_CREATE
108	    )
109	
110	    val FINANCE_CLERK_PERMISSIONS = setOf(
111	        Permission.PAYMENT_RECORD,
112	        Permission.PAYMENT_RECONCILE,
113	        Permission.REFUND_ISSUE,
114	        Permission.IMPORT_MANAGE,
115	        Permission.EXPORT_MANAGE
116	    )
117	
118	    fun permissionsForRole(roleType: RoleType): Set<Permission> = when (roleType) {
119	        RoleType.ADMINISTRATOR -> ADMINISTRATOR_PERMISSIONS
120	        RoleType.REGISTRAR -> REGISTRAR_PERMISSIONS
121	        RoleType.INSTRUCTOR -> INSTRUCTOR_PERMISSIONS
122	        RoleType.TEACHING_ASSISTANT -> TEACHING_ASSISTANT_PERMISSIONS
123	        RoleType.LEARNER -> LEARNER_PERMISSIONS
124	        RoleType.FINANCE_CLERK -> FINANCE_CLERK_PERMISSIONS
125	    }
126	}

288	        .ofPattern("MMM dd, yyyy HH:mm:ss")
289	        .withZone(ZoneId.systemDefault())

303	            .padding(vertical = 4.dp)
304	    ) {
305	        Row(

307	            horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.SpaceBetween,
308	            verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically
309	        ) {
310	            Text(
311	                text = event.actionType.name.replace("_", " "),
312	                style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyLarge,
313	                fontWeight = FontWeight.Medium,
314	                modifier = Modifier.weight(1f)
315	            )
316	            Text(
317	                text = event.outcome.name,
318	                style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelMedium,
319	                color = outcomeColor,
320	                fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold
321	            )
322	        }
323	        Text(
324	            text = formattedTimestamp,
325	            style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
326	            color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
327	        )
328	        Divider(modifier = Modifier.padding(top = 8.dp))
329	    }
330	}

67	
68	data class ImportUiState(
69	    val selectedFileName: String = "",
70	    val fileType: String = "csv",
71	    val fileContentBytes: ByteArray? = null,
72	    val signatureHex: String = "",
73	    val isSubmitting: Boolean = false,
74	    val isSubmitted: Boolean = false,
75	    val resultJob: ImportJob? = null,
76	    val warnings: List<String> = emptyList(),
77	    val errorMessage: String? = null
78	)
79	
80	@HiltViewModel
81	class ImportViewModel @Inject constructor(
82	    private val importSettlementUseCase: ImportSettlementUseCase
83	) : ViewModel() {
84	
85	    private val _uiState = MutableStateFlow(ImportUiState())
86	    val uiState: StateFlow<ImportUiState> = _uiState.asStateFlow()
87	
88	    fun onFileSelected(uri: Uri, context: Context) {
89	        val contentBytes = context.contentResolver.openInputStream(uri)?.readBytes()
90	        if (contentBytes == null) {
91	            _uiState.update { it.copy(errorMessage = "Could not read the selected file") }
92	            return
93	        }
94	
95	        val fileName = resolveFileName(uri, context)
96	        val fileType = when {
97	            fileName.endsWith(".csv", ignoreCase = true) -> "csv"
98	            fileName.endsWith(".json", ignoreCase = true) -> "json"
99	            else -> "csv"
100	        }
101	
102	        _uiState.update {
103	            it.copy(
104	                selectedFileName = fileName,
105	                fileType = fileType,
106	                fileContentBytes = contentBytes,
107	                errorMessage = null
108	            )
109	        }
110	    }
111	
112	    fun updateSignatureHex(value: String) {
113	        _uiState.update { it.copy(signatureHex = value) }
114	    }
115	
116	    fun clearError() {
117	        _uiState.update { it.copy(errorMessage = null) }
118	    }
119	
120	    fun startImport() {
121	        val current = _uiState.value
122	        if (current.selectedFileName.isBlank() || current.fileContentBytes == null) {
123	            _uiState.update { it.copy(errorMessage = "Please select a file first") }
124	            return
125	        }
126	
127	        viewModelScope.launch {
128	            _uiState.update { it.copy(isSubmitting = true, errorMessage = null) }
129	
130	            val contentString = current.fileContentBytes.decodeToString()
131	            val rawRows = parseContent(contentString, current.fileType)
132	            if (rawRows == null) {
133	                _uiState.update {
134	                    it.copy(isSubmitting = false, errorMessage = "Could not parse file content. Ensure the file is valid ${current.fileType.uppercase()}.")
135	                }
136	                return@launch
137	            }
138	
139	            val fileSizeBytes = current.fileContentBytes.size.toLong()
140	            when (val result = importSettlementUseCase.importFile(
141	                fileName = current.selectedFileName,
142	                fileType = current.fileType,
143	                fileSizeBytes = fileSizeBytes,
144	                rawRows = rawRows,
145	                fileContent = current.fileContentBytes,
146	                signatureHex = current.signatureHex.ifBlank { null }
147	            )) {
148	                is AppResult.Success -> {
149	                    _uiState.update {
150	                        it.copy(
151	                            isSubmitting = false,
152	                            isSubmitted = true,
153	                            resultJob = result.data,
154	                            warnings = result.warnings
155	                        )
156	                    }
157	                }
158	                is AppResult.ValidationError -> {
159	                    _uiState.update {
160	                        it.copy(
161	                            isSubmitting = false,
162	                            errorMessage = result.globalErrors.firstOrNull()
163	                                ?: result.fieldErrors.values.firstOrNull()
164	                                ?: "Validation error"
165	                        )
166	                    }
167	                }
168	                is AppResult.PermissionError -> {
169	                    _uiState.update {
170	                        it.copy(isSubmitting = false, errorMessage = "Permission denied")
171	                    }
172	                }
173	                is AppResult.ConflictError -> {
174	                    _uiState.update {
175	                        it.copy(isSubmitting = false, errorMessage = result.message)
176	                    }
177	                }
178	                is AppResult.NotFoundError -> {
179	                    _uiState.update {
180	                        it.copy(isSubmitting = false, errorMessage = "Resource not found")
181	                    }
182	                }
183	                is AppResult.SystemError -> {
184	                    _uiState.update {
185	                        it.copy(isSubmitting = false, errorMessage = result.message)
186	                    }
187	                }
188	            }
189	        }
190	    }
191	
192	    fun resetForm() {
193	        _uiState.update { ImportUiState() }
194	    }
195	
196	    private fun resolveFileName(uri: Uri, context: Context): String {
197	        var name = "unknown_file"
198	        context.contentResolver.query(uri, null, null, null, null)?.use { cursor ->
199	            val nameIndex = cursor.getColumnIndex(OpenableColumns.DISPLAY_NAME)
200	            if (nameIndex >= 0 && cursor.moveToFirst()) {
201	                name = cursor.getString(nameIndex) ?: name
202	            }
203	        }
204	        return name
205	    }
206	
207	    private fun parseContent(content: String, fileType: String): List<Map<String, String>>? {
208	        return when (fileType) {
209	            "csv" -> parseCsv(content)
210	            "json" -> parseJson(content)
211	            else -> parseCsv(content)
212	        }
213	    }
214	
215	    private fun parseCsv(csv: String): List<Map<String, String>>? {
216	        return try {
217	            val lines = csv.lines().filter { it.isNotBlank() }
218	            if (lines.size < 2) return null
219	            val headers = lines.first().split(",").map { it.trim().removeSurrounding("\"") }
220	            val rows = mutableListOf<Map<String, String>>()
221	            for (line in lines.drop(1)) {
222	                val values = line.split(",").map { it.trim().removeSurrounding("\"") }
223	                val map = mutableMapOf<String, String>()
224	                headers.forEachIndexed { index, header ->
225	                    if (index < values.size) {
226	                        map[header] = values[index]
227	                    }
228	                }
229	                if (map.isNotEmpty()) rows.add(map)
230	            }
231	            if (rows.isEmpty()) null else rows
232	        } catch (_: Exception) {
233	            null
234	        }
235	    }
236	
237	    private fun parseJson(json: String): List<Map<String, String>>? {
238	        return try {
239	            val trimmed = json.trim()
240	            if (!trimmed.startsWith("[")) return null
241	            val result = mutableListOf<Map<String, String>>()
242	            val objectPattern = Regex("\\{([^}]*)\\}")
243	            val kvPattern = Regex("\"([^\"]+)\"\\s*:\\s*\"([^\"]*)\"")
244	            for (match in objectPattern.findAll(trimmed)) {
245	                val map = mutableMapOf<String, String>()
246	                for (kv in kvPattern.findAll(match.groupValues[1])) {
247	                    map[kv.groupValues[1]] = kv.groupValues[2]
248	                }
249	                if (map.isNotEmpty()) {
250	                    result.add(map)
251	                }
252	            }
253	            if (result.isEmpty()) null else result
254	        } catch (_: Exception) {
255	            null
256	        }
257	    }
258	}

1	package com.learnmart.app.domain.usecase.assessment
2	
3	import com.learnmart.app.domain.model.*
4	import com.learnmart.app.domain.repository.AuditRepository
5	import com.learnmart.app.domain.repository.AssessmentRepository
6	import com.learnmart.app.domain.usecase.auth.CheckPermissionUseCase
7	import com.learnmart.app.security.SessionManager
8	import com.learnmart.app.util.AppResult
9	import com.learnmart.app.util.IdGenerator
10	import com.learnmart.app.util.TimeUtils
11	import javax.inject.Inject
12	
13	data class CreateAssignmentRequest(
14	    val classOfferingId: String,
15	    val title: String,
16	    val description: String,
17	    val assessmentType: AssessmentType,
18	    val questionIds: List<String>,
19	    val totalPoints: Int,
20	    val releaseStart: java.time.Instant,
21	    val releaseEnd: java.time.Instant,
22	    val timeLimitMinutes: Int?,
23	    val allowLateSubmission: Boolean,
24	    val allowResubmission: Boolean
25	)
26	
27	class ManageAssessmentUseCase @Inject constructor(
28	    private val assessmentRepository: AssessmentRepository,
29	    private val auditRepository: AuditRepository,
30	    private val checkPermission: CheckPermissionUseCase,
31	    private val sessionManager: SessionManager
32	) {
33	    suspend fun createAssignment(request: CreateAssignmentRequest): AppResult<Assignment> {
34	        if (!checkPermission.hasPermission(Permission.ASSESSMENT_CREATE)) {
35	            return AppResult.PermissionError("Requires assessment.create")
36	        }
37	
38	        val errors = mutableMapOf<String, String>()
39	        if (request.title.isBlank()) errors["title"] = "Title is required"
40	        if (request.releaseEnd.isBefore(request.releaseStart)) {
41	            errors["releaseEnd"] = "Release end must be after start"
42	        }
43	        if (request.totalPoints < 1) errors["totalPoints"] = "Total points must be >= 1"
44	        if (errors.isNotEmpty()) return AppResult.ValidationError(fieldErrors = errors)
45	
46	        val now = TimeUtils.nowUtc()
47	        val userId = sessionManager.getCurrentUserId() ?: "SYSTEM"
48	
49	        val assignment = Assignment(
50	            id = IdGenerator.newId(),
51	            classOfferingId = request.classOfferingId,
52	            title = request.title.trim(),
53	            description = request.description.trim(),
54	            assessmentType = request.assessmentType,
55	            questionBankId = null,
56	            questionIds = request.questionIds,
57	            totalPoints = request.totalPoints,
58	            releaseStart = request.releaseStart,
59	            releaseEnd = request.releaseEnd,
60	            timeLimitMinutes = request.timeLimitMinutes,
61	            allowLateSubmission = request.allowLateSubmission,
62	            allowResubmission = request.allowResubmission,
63	            createdBy = userId,
64	            createdAt = now,
65	            updatedAt = now,
66	            version = 1
67	        )
68	
69	        assessmentRepository.createAssignment(assignment)
70	
71	        // Create release window
72	        assessmentRepository.createReleaseWindow(AssessmentReleaseWindow(
73	            id = IdGenerator.newId(),
74	            assessmentId = assignment.id,
75	            releaseStart = request.releaseStart,
76	            releaseEnd = request.releaseEnd,
77	            isActive = true
78	        ))
79	
80	        auditRepository.logEvent(AuditEvent(
81	            id = IdGenerator.newId(),
82	            actorId = userId, actorUsername = null,
83	            actionType = AuditActionType.ASSIGNMENT_CREATED,
84	            targetEntityType = "Assignment", targetEntityId = assignment.id,
85	            beforeSummary = null,
86	            afterSummary = "title=${assignment.title}, type=${assignment.assessmentType}, points=${assignment.totalPoints}",
87	            reason = null, sessionId = sessionManager.getCurrentSessionId(),
88	            outcome = AuditOutcome.SUCCESS, timestamp = now, metadata = null
89	        ))
90	
91	        return AppResult.Success(assignment)
92	    }
93	
94	    suspend fun getAssignmentById(id: String): AppResult<Assignment> {
95	        val assignment = assessmentRepository.getAssignmentById(id)
96	            ?: return AppResult.NotFoundError("ASSIGNMENT_NOT_FOUND")
97	        return AppResult.Success(assignment)
98	    }
99	
100	    suspend fun getAssignmentsForClass(classOfferingId: String): List<Assignment> =
101	        assessmentRepository.getAssignmentsByClassOffering(classOfferingId)
102	
103	    suspend fun getMySubmissions(): List<Submission> {
104	        val userId = sessionManager.getCurrentUserId() ?: return emptyList()
105	        return assessmentRepository.getSubmissionsByLearner(userId)
106	    }
107	
108	    suspend fun getSubmissionsForAssessment(assessmentId: String, limit: Int = 50, offset: Int = 0): List<Submission> =
109	        assessmentRepository.getSubmissionsByAssessment(assessmentId, limit, offset)
110	
111	    // --- Question Bank ---
112	    suspend fun createQuestionBank(classOfferingId: String, name: String, description: String): AppResult<QuestionBank> {
113	        if (!checkPermission.hasPermission(Permission.ASSESSMENT_CREATE)) {
114	            return AppResult.PermissionError()
115	        }
116	        val now = TimeUtils.nowUtc()
117	        val bank = QuestionBank(
118	            id = IdGenerator.newId(), classOfferingId = classOfferingId,
119	            name = name, description = description,
120	            createdBy = sessionManager.getCurrentUserId() ?: "SYSTEM",
121	            createdAt = now, updatedAt = now
122	        )
123	        assessmentRepository.createQuestionBank(bank)
124	        return AppResult.Success(bank)
125	    }
126	
127	    suspend fun createQuestion(
128	        questionBankId: String, questionType: QuestionType, difficulty: DifficultyLevel,
129	        questionText: String, explanation: String?, points: Int, tagIds: List<String>,
130	        choices: List<Pair<String, Boolean>> // (choiceText, isCorrect)
131	    ): AppResult<Question> {
132	        if (!checkPermission.hasPermission(Permission.ASSESSMENT_CREATE)) {
133	            return AppResult.PermissionError()
134	        }
135	        if (questionText.isBlank()) return AppResult.ValidationError(fieldErrors = mapOf("questionText" to "Required"))
136	        if (points < 1) return AppResult.ValidationError(fieldErrors = mapOf("points" to "Must be >= 1"))
137	        if (questionType == QuestionType.OBJECTIVE && choices.isEmpty()) {
138	            return AppResult.ValidationError(globalErrors = listOf("Objective questions require at least one choice"))
139	        }
140	
141	        val now = TimeUtils.nowUtc()
142	        val question = Question(
143	            id = IdGenerator.newId(), questionBankId = questionBankId,
144	            questionType = questionType, difficulty = difficulty,
145	            questionText = questionText, explanation = explanation,
146	            points = points, tagIds = tagIds,
147	            createdBy = sessionManager.getCurrentUserId() ?: "SYSTEM",
148	            createdAt = now, updatedAt = now, version = 1
149	        )
150	        assessmentRepository.createQuestion(question)
151	
152	        if (choices.isNotEmpty()) {
153	            val choiceEntities = choices.mapIndexed { index, (text, correct) ->
154	                QuestionChoice(
155	                    id = IdGenerator.newId(), questionId = question.id,
156	                    choiceText = text, isCorrect = correct, displayOrder = index + 1
157	                )
158	            }
159	            assessmentRepository.createChoices(choiceEntities)
160	        }
161	
162	        return AppResult.Success(question)
163	    }
164	
165	    suspend fun getQuestionsForBank(bankId: String): List<Question> =
166	        assessmentRepository.getQuestionsByBankId(bankId)
167	
168	    suspend fun getChoicesForQuestion(questionId: String): List<QuestionChoice> =
169	        assessmentRepository.getChoicesForQuestion(questionId)
170	
171	    // --- Grading Queue ---
172	    suspend fun getPendingGradingQueue(classOfferingId: String): List<SubjectiveGradeQueueItem> =
173	        assessmentRepository.getPendingQueueByClassOffering(classOfferingId)
174	
175	    suspend fun getMyGradingQueue(): List<SubjectiveGradeQueueItem> {
176	        val userId = sessionManager.getCurrentUserId() ?: return emptyList()
177	        return assessmentRepository.getPendingQueueByGrader(userId)
178	    }
179	
180	    suspend fun gradeSubjectiveAnswer(
181	        queueItemId: String,
182	        score: Int,
183	        feedback: String?
184	    ): AppResult<GradeDecision> {
185	        if (!checkPermission.hasPermission(Permission.ASSESSMENT_GRADE)) {
186	            return AppResult.PermissionError("Requires assessment.grade")
187	        }
188	
189	        val queueItem = assessmentRepository.getGradeQueueItemById(queueItemId)
190	            ?: return AppResult.NotFoundError("QUEUE_ITEM_NOT_FOUND")
191	
192	        if (queueItem.status != GradeQueueStatus.PENDING && queueItem.status != GradeQueueStatus.IN_REVIEW) {
193	            return AppResult.ValidationError(globalErrors = listOf("Queue item is not pending"))
194	        }
195	
196	        val question = assessmentRepository.getQuestionById(queueItem.questionId)
197	        if (question != null && score > question.points) {
198	            return AppResult.ValidationError(
199	                fieldErrors = mapOf("score" to "Score cannot exceed max points (${question.points})")
200	            )
201	        }
202	
203	        val now = TimeUtils.nowUtc()
204	        val userId = sessionManager.getCurrentUserId() ?: "SYSTEM"
205	
206	        val decision = GradeDecision(
207	            id = IdGenerator.newId(),
208	            submissionAnswerId = queueItem.submissionAnswerId,
209	            gradedBy = userId,
210	            score = score,
211	            maxScore = question?.points ?: score,
212	            feedback = feedback,
213	            gradedAt = now
214	        )
215	        assessmentRepository.createGradeDecision(decision)
216	
217	        // Update queue item
218	        assessmentRepository.updateGradeQueueItem(queueItem.copy(
219	            status = GradeQueueStatus.GRADED,
220	            assignedGraderId = userId,
221	            updatedAt = now
222	        ))
223	
224	        // Check if all subjective items are graded
225	        checkAndFinalizeSubmission(queueItem.submissionId, queueItem.assessmentId)
226	
227	        return AppResult.Success(decision)
228	    }
229	
230	    suspend fun reopenSubmission(submissionId: String, reason: String): AppResult<Submission> {
231	        if (!checkPermission.hasPermission(Permission.ASSESSMENT_REOPEN)) {
232	            return AppResult.PermissionError("Requires assessment.reopen")
233	        }
234	
235	        val submission = assessmentRepository.getSubmissionById(submissionId)
236	            ?: return AppResult.NotFoundError("SUBMISSION_NOT_FOUND")
237	
238	        if (submission.status != SubmissionStatus.FINALIZED) {
239	            return AppResult.ValidationError(globalErrors = listOf("Only finalized submissions can be reopened"))
240	        }
241	
242	        assessmentRepository.updateSubmissionStatus(submissionId, SubmissionStatus.REOPENED_BY_INSTRUCTOR, submission.version)
243	
244	        val now = TimeUtils.nowUtc()
245	        auditRepository.logEvent(AuditEvent(
246	            id = IdGenerator.newId(),
247	            actorId = sessionManager.getCurrentUserId(), actorUsername = null,
248	            actionType = AuditActionType.SUBMISSION_REOPENED,
249	            targetEntityType = "Submission", targetEntityId = submissionId,
250	            beforeSummary = "status=FINALIZED", afterSummary = "status=REOPENED_BY_INSTRUCTOR",
251	            reason = reason, sessionId = sessionManager.getCurrentSessionId(),
252	            outcome = AuditOutcome.SUCCESS, timestamp = now, metadata = null
253	        ))
254	
255	        auditRepository.logStateTransition(StateTransitionLog(
256	            id = IdGenerator.newId(), entityType = "Submission", entityId = submissionId,
257	            fromState = "FINALIZED", toState = "REOPENED_BY_INSTRUCTOR",
258	            triggeredBy = sessionManager.getCurrentUserId() ?: "SYSTEM",
259	            reason = reason, timestamp = now
260	        ))
261	
262	        return AppResult.Success(assessmentRepository.getSubmissionById(submissionId)!!)
263	    }
264	
265	    private suspend fun checkAndFinalizeSubmission(submissionId: String, assessmentId: String) {
266	        val allQueueItems = assessmentRepository.getPendingQueueByClassOffering("")
267	            .filter { it.submissionId == submissionId }
268	
269	        // If there are still pending items, don't finalize
270	        if (allQueueItems.any { it.status == GradeQueueStatus.PENDING || it.status == GradeQueueStatus.IN_REVIEW }) {
271	            return
272	        }
273	
274	        // All graded - update submission status to GRADED then FINALIZED
275	        val submission = assessmentRepository.getSubmissionById(submissionId) ?: return
276	        if (submission.status == SubmissionStatus.QUEUED_FOR_MANUAL_REVIEW) {
277	            // Calculate total score
278	            val answers = assessmentRepository.getAnswersForSubmission(submissionId)
279	            var totalScore = 0
280	            for (answer in answers) {
281	                val objResult = assessmentRepository.getObjectiveGradeResult(answer.id)
282	                val gradeDecision = assessmentRepository.getGradeDecision(answer.id)
283	                totalScore += objResult?.score ?: gradeDecision?.score ?: 0
284	            }
285	
286	            val maxScore = submission.maxScore ?: 0
287	            val percentage = if (maxScore > 0) (totalScore.toDouble() / maxScore * 100) else 0.0
288	
289	            assessmentRepository.updateSubmission(submission.copy(
290	                status = SubmissionStatus.GRADED,
291	                totalScore = totalScore,
292	                gradePercentage = percentage,
293	                gradedBy = "SYSTEM",
294	                gradedAt = TimeUtils.nowUtc(),
295	                updatedAt = TimeUtils.nowUtc()
296	            ))
297	        }
298	    }
299	}

2	
3	sealed interface AppResult<out T> {
4	    data class Success<T>(
5	        val data: T,
6	        val warnings: List<String> = emptyList()
7	    ) : AppResult<T>
8	
9	    data class ValidationError(
10	        val fieldErrors: Map<String, String> = emptyMap(),
11	        val globalErrors: List<String> = emptyList()
12	    ) : AppResult<Nothing>
13	
14	    data class ConflictError(
15	        val code: String,
16	        val message: String
17	    ) : AppResult<Nothing>
18	
19	    data class PermissionError(
20	        val code: String = "FORBIDDEN"
21	    ) : AppResult<Nothing>
22	
23	    data class NotFoundError(
24	        val code: String = "NOT_FOUND"
25	    ) : AppResult<Nothing>
26	
27	    data class SystemError(
28	        val code: String,
29	        val message: String,
30	        val retryable: Boolean
31	    ) : AppResult<Nothing>
32	}
33	
34	inline fun <T, R> AppResult<T>.map(transform: (T) -> R): AppResult<R> = when (this) {
35	    is AppResult.Success -> AppResult.Success(transform(data), warnings)
36	    is AppResult.ValidationError -> this
37	    is AppResult.ConflictError -> this
38	    is AppResult.PermissionError -> this
39	    is AppResult.NotFoundError -> this
40	    is AppResult.SystemError -> this
41	}
42	
43	inline fun <T> AppResult<T>.onSuccess(action: (T) -> Unit): AppResult<T> {
44	    if (this is AppResult.Success) action(data)
45	    return this
46	}
47	
48	inline fun <T> AppResult<T>.onError(action: (AppResult<Nothing>) -> Unit): AppResult<T> {
49	    if (this !is AppResult.Success) {
50	        @Suppress("UNCHECKED_CAST")
51	        action(this as AppResult<Nothing>)
52	    }
53	    return this
54	}

1	# LearnMart Implementation Assumptions
2	
3	This document records all non-trivial assumptions made during implementation to resolve ambiguities in the PRD.
4	
5	## Phase 1 — Foundation, Security, and Core Data Layer
6	
7	### Authentication & Session
8	
9	1. **Credential storage uses PBKDF2WithHmacSHA256** with 120,000 iterations and 256-bit key length. The PRD specifies PIN/password authentication but does not prescribe the hashing algorithm. PBKDF2 was chosen as it is well-supported on Android without additional dependencies.
10	
11	2. **Session timeout is measured from last activity**, not from session creation. The 15-minute idle timeout resets on each user interaction that refreshes the session.
12	
13	3. **Lockout counter resets on successful login**. The PRD specifies 5 failed attempts within 15 minutes triggers a 15-minute lockout. After successful login, the counter resets to zero.
14	
15	4. **Lockout state persists via user entity status field** (LOCKED with lockedUntil timestamp) rather than a separate lockout table, since the PRD requires lockout to survive app restart.
16	
17	5. **A user may hold only one active session at a time**. Creating a new session terminates any existing active session for that user. This simplifies single-device operation.
18	
19	6. **Database encryption key is generated on first launch and stored in SharedPreferences** as a reference. In production, this should use Android Keystore-backed encryption. The current implementation generates a UUID-based key. This is documented as a known area for hardening.
20	
21	### Roles & Permissions
22	
23	7. **Roles are pre-seeded system roles and cannot be deleted via the UI**. The 6 roles (Administrator, Registrar, Instructor, Teaching Assistant, Learner, Finance Clerk) are created at first launch with their default permission sets.
24	
25	8. **Permission checks use capability strings** (e.g., "catalog.manage") matched via the role_permissions join table. This allows future extension without schema changes.
26	
27	9. **A user may hold multiple roles simultaneously**. Effective permissions are the union of all assigned role permissions.
28	
29	10. **Registrar gets catalog.manage permission as "Limited"** per the role matrix. This is implemented as full catalog.manage for now; fine-grained field-level restrictions would require additional scope metadata.
30	
31	### Policies
32	
33	11. **Policy versioning is implemented via append-only history**. When a policy is updated, the old version is deactivated (is_active=false with effective_until set) and a new version is created. The policy_history table records all changes for audit purposes.
34	
35	12. **Policy keys are string-typed** and values are stored as strings with type conversion at the repository layer. This allows flexible policy configuration without schema changes per policy type.
36	
37	13. **Default policy values are defined in PolicyDefaults** and used as fallbacks when no active policy exists for a given type/key combination.
38	
39	### Audit
40	
41	14. **Audit events are append-only**. The audit_events table has no UPDATE or DELETE operations exposed. Events are inserted with ABORT conflict strategy to prevent accidental overwrites.
42	
43	15. **State transition logs are separate from audit events** to allow efficient entity history replay without filtering through all audit events.
44	
45	### Data Model
46	
47	16. **All timestamps are stored as epoch milliseconds (Long)** in Room entities and converted to java.time.Instant in domain models. This provides efficient storage and indexing while maintaining type safety in business logic.
48	
49	17. **Optimistic locking uses a version integer** on mutable entities (User, Policy). Updates that specify a stale version will fail, preventing silent overwrites from concurrent operations.
50	
51	18. **The seed data password for demo users is "pass1234"** and the admin password is "admin1234". These are documented here for operator reference and should be changed in production deployment.
52	
53	### Architecture
54	
55	19. **Room is used as the primary persistence layer** (not SQLDelight for Phase 1). SQLDelight will be integrated for complex queries in later phases where its type-safe SQL advantages are most beneficial. Room provides the transactional guarantees needed for Phase 1.
56	
57	20. **SQLCipher provides database encryption** via the SupportFactory integration with Room. The entire database file is encrypted at rest.
58	
59	21. **WorkManager is configured with Hilt** via custom WorkerFactory injection. The default initializer is disabled in the manifest to prevent double initialization.
60	
61	## General Assumptions (Applicable to All Phases)
62	
63	22. **Partial payments are allowed by default**, but fulfillment before full payment requires explicit finance exception with audit note.
64	
65	23. **Waitlist promoted offer expires after 24 hours** (PRD did not specify a promotion acceptance window).
66	
67	24. **Parallel approvals require unanimous approval by default** (no quorum rules provided).
68	
69	25. **Refund count limit uses calendar day in device local timezone**.
70	
71	26. **Default import size cap is 25 MB** for local validation safety.
72	
73	27. **Signature verification is required whenever signature metadata/policy says so**. Exact signature scheme will be HMAC-SHA256 with a locally configured shared secret.
74	
75	28. **Transactional source of truth remains the on-device database only**; reports are query-derived and not pre-aggregated.
76	
77	29. **Archived data remains queryable** unless access policy restricts it; hard deletion is avoided for audited/financial records.
78	
79	30. **Device timezone is installation-configured operational timezone**, with UTC persisted for timestamp comparisons and local time rendered for display.
80	
81	## Audit Fix Assumptions (Post-Audit)
82	
83	31. **Room/SQLDelight boundary**: Room owns all schema creation, migrations, and transactional writes. SQLDelight owns a separate `learnmart_queries.db` for type-safe audit query reads, mirrored from Room's authoritative store. This avoids dual-driver encryption conflicts.
84	
85	32. **Database encryption key protection**: The DB passphrase is encrypted using Android Keystore (AES/GCM) and the encrypted blob stored in SharedPreferences. On environments without Keystore (Docker/CI), a derived fallback key is used with a logged warning.
86	
87	33. **Settlement signature verification uses HMAC-SHA256** with a locally configured shared secret stored in policy `settlement_signature_secret`. When `signature_verification_required` policy is true, imports without valid signatures are rejected.
88	
89	34. **Reconciliation writes are atomic**: The entire reconciliation run (matches, discrepancies, import status update) is wrapped in a Room transaction. Parse/processing failures cause full rollback.
90	
91	35. **Destructive migration on downgrade is removed**. If a schema downgrade is detected, the app logs a warning and the operator should restore from backup. Data is never silently destroyed.
92	
93	36. **WorkManager constraints for heavy jobs**: Reconciliation and backup workers require `idle + charging + battery not low` per prompt. Lightweight timeout workers require only `battery not low`.
94	
95	37. **UI triggers WorkManager, not inline execution**: The ReconciliationScreen and BackupRestoreScreen enqueue jobs via `WorkScheduler` rather than calling use cases directly. This ensures heavy operations only run under constrained conditions. The UI shows "enqueued" state and allows loading results after worker completion.
96	
97	38. **Scoped storage backup UX**: The BackupRestoreScreen uses real SAF launchers (`CreateDocument` for export, `OpenDocument` for restore-from-file). Content URIs from SAF are passed to `BackupRestoreUseCase.exportBackupToStream()` and `restoreFromStream()`. Internal-only file paths are not exposed to the user.
98	
99	39. **Operations route-level guards**: All operations routes are wrapped with `RequireOperationsAccess`, a composable guard that checks permissions before rendering. This is defense-in-depth on top of use-case permission checks, preventing access via crafted navigation state.
100	
101	40. **ReconciliationWorker atomicity**: The worker wraps all writes (reconciliation run, matches, discrepancies, import job status update, audit event) in a single `database.withTransaction {}` block. Parse or write failures cause full rollback. This matches the same transactional path used by `ReconciliationUseCase`.
102	
103	41. **High-churn list strategy**: Compose `LazyColumn` with stable `key = { it.id }` is used instead of embedded RecyclerView+DiffUtil. This provides equivalent diff-based incremental updates natively in Compose without interop overhead. See README for full justification.
104	
105	42. **Backup encryption model**: The backup passphrase is operator-configured (policy `backup_passphrase`), NOT stored in Android Keystore. Keystore is used only for the primary database encryption key. PBKDF2WithHmacSHA256 derives the AES-256 key from passphrase + random salt. The archive header contains only salt and IV — no raw key material.
106

28	    suspend fun getAllActiveUsers(): AppResult<Flow<List<User>>> {
29	        if (!checkPermission.hasPermission(Permission.USER_MANAGE)) {
30	            return AppResult.PermissionError("Requires user.manage permission")
31	        }
32	        return AppResult.Success(userRepository.getAllActiveUsers())
33	    }

35	    suspend fun getUserById(id: String): AppResult<User> {
36	        if (!checkPermission.hasPermission(Permission.USER_MANAGE)) {
37	            return AppResult.PermissionError("Requires user.manage permission")
38	        }
39	        val user = userRepository.getUserById(id)
40	            ?: return AppResult.NotFoundError("USER_NOT_FOUND")
41	        return AppResult.Success(user)
42	    }

44	    suspend fun unlockUser(userId: String): AppResult<User> {
45	        if (!checkPermission.hasPermission(Permission.USER_MANAGE)) {
46	            return AppResult.PermissionError()
47	        }
48	
49	        val user = userRepository.getUserById(userId)
50	            ?: return AppResult.NotFoundError()
51	
52	        if (user.status != UserStatus.LOCKED) {
53	            return AppResult.ValidationError(globalErrors = listOf("User is not locked"))
54	        }
55	
56	        userRepository.updateLoginAttempts(userId, 0, null, user.version)
57	        userRepository.updateStatus(userId, UserStatus.ACTIVE.name, user.version)
58	
59	        auditRepository.logEvent(
60	            AuditEvent(
61	                id = IdGenerator.newId(),
62	                actorId = sessionManager.getCurrentUserId(),

65	                targetEntityType = "User",
66	                targetEntityId = userId,
67	                beforeSummary = "status=LOCKED",
68	                afterSummary = "status=ACTIVE",
69	                reason = "Manual unlock by administrator",
70	                sessionId = sessionManager.getCurrentSessionId(),
71	                outcome = AuditOutcome.SUCCESS,
72	                timestamp = TimeUtils.nowUtc(),
73	                metadata = null
74	            )
75	        )
76	
77	        return AppResult.Success(userRepository.getUserById(userId)!!)
78	    }
79
